text:
/ci1 1 海王種のおでましだけど
この端末はハズレみたいね。
ダーカーがいるのが正解か。

/ci1 1 We've got an oceanid welcome wagon, but
the terminal's blank. Guess it's got to be the
one guarded by Falspawn, huh?

海王種のおでましだけど
この端末はハズレみたいね。
ダーカーがいるのが正解か。

We've got an oceanid welcome wagon, but the
terminal's blank. Guess it's got to be the one
guarded by Falspawn, huh?
